hook: You pay for therapy. Want to know how little your therapist might actually keep?
vo: On the big platforms a client can pay seventy to a hundred dollars a week.
The therapist doing the work might see around a third of that.
The rest goes to the platform.
That gap matters — for therapists, and probably for your care.
cta: There's a fairer way to do this.
broll_notes: Simple split-screen animation: left side shows money going in, right side shows a much smaller portion landing in a separate pot. No faces, no brand names. Muted palette. Numbers appear as plain text on screen, no fancy graphics.
